title: New York Sues Coinbase and Gemini Over Alleged Illegal Prediction Market Gambling Operations
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

New York Sues Coinbase and Gemini Over Alleged Illegal Prediction Market Gambling Operations

New York Attorney General Letitia James has sued Coinbase and Gemini, alleging their prediction market platforms constitute illegal gambling operations.

This post New York Sues Coinbase and Gemini Over Alleged Illegal Prediction Market Gambling Operations first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Bitcoin Whales Accumulate 45,000 BTC as Warsh and Paparo Back Bitcoin’s Role
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Whales Accumulate 45,000 BTC as Warsh and Paparo Back Bitcoin’s Role

Bitcoin rose to around $76,000 as whales accumulated 45,000 BTC and institutional inflows surged, while U.S. officials including Kevin Warsh and Admiral Paparo signaled growing acceptance of Bitcoin in finance and national security.

This post Bitcoin Whales Accumulate 45,000 BTC as Warsh and Paparo Back Bitcoin’s Role first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Top U.S. Pacific Commander Calls Bitcoin a “Valuable Computer Science Tool” for National Power And Security
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Top U.S. Pacific Commander Calls Bitcoin a “Valuable Computer Science Tool” for National Power And Security

Admiral Samuel Paparo of U.S. Indo-Pacific Command told the Senate Armed Services Committee that Bitcoin is a “valuable computer science tool as power projection."

This post Top U.S. Pacific Commander Calls Bitcoin a “Valuable Computer Science Tool” for National Power And Security first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Scammers Target Stranded Ships in Strait of Hormuz With Fake Bitcoin Transit Fees
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Scammers Target Stranded Ships in Strait of Hormuz With Fake Bitcoin Transit Fees

Fraudsters are targeting global shipping firms with fake Strait of Hormuz transit fees, demanding payment in Bitcoin and Tether as vessels remain stranded amid Gulf tensions.

This post Scammers Target Stranded Ships in Strait of Hormuz With Fake Bitcoin Transit Fees first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Morgan Stanley’s Spot Bitcoin ETF Tops $139M in Assets Within Nine Days
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Morgan Stanley’s Spot Bitcoin ETF Tops $139M in Assets Within Nine Days

Morgan Stanley’s spot Bitcoin ETF has accumulated over $139 million in BTC within nine days of launch, indicating strong early institutional demand for the firm’s new crypto offering.

This post Morgan Stanley’s Spot Bitcoin ETF Tops $139M in Assets Within Nine Days first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Onramp Launches Finance Platform Combining Cash, Bitcoin and Gold in One Account
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Onramp Launches Finance Platform Combining Cash, Bitcoin and Gold in One Account

Onramp launched a unified platform today combining cash management, bitcoin services, and gold ownership into a single account aimed at long-term wealth building.

This post Onramp Launches Finance Platform Combining Cash, Bitcoin and Gold in One Account first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
